content_body:
My boyfriend and I came up as a last minute decision and I am so glad that we did! Only one night here and one day of hiking, but well worth it! It's a great view and a very well cared for home. 

We've eaten, now twice, at Harvest on Main and both meals were delicious. We hiked Jack's River Trail and the paths lead to a beautiful path of moss, river, rocks, etc.

We will be back!
title: Enjoyable Hike in North GA Mountains
